title: Set up a Hono API server (Node.js / Bun / Edge)
summary: Create a type-safe HTTP API with Hono — install, define routes with Zod validation, add middleware, and run on Node.js, Bun, or any edge runtime.
declaration: I will set up a Hono web server for this project. Hono runs on Node.js, Bun, Deno, Cloudflare Workers, and AWS Lambda with zero-change code. I will use the Node.js adapter by default — tell me if you need a different runtime before I begin.
